prompt: Create a macOS Burn Folder named 'KinBench Burn' on the Desktop. The on-disk artifact is a directory at ~/Desktop/KinBench\ Burn.fpbf (the .fpbf extension is what makes Finder treat it as a burn folder). Note: modern macOS (2024+) removed 'New Burn Folder' from Finder's File menu since optical drives are deprecated, so the AppleScript / UI paths no longer work — create the directory directly with `mkdir`.
